title: Blocky 3D Rails
description: 3D models to replace the paper-thin rails.
body:
## Blocky Rails

This resource pack grounds rails into the environment while retaining the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft. The rails maintain their original height, while the wooden rail ties have been submerged into the ground to provide a model that looks clean and unobtrusive from all angles.

_For the full blocky collection, try [Blocky Replacements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-replacements)._

### <u>Includes:</u>
☑ Proper texture-culling\
☑ No additional textures\
☑ No stretched textures\
☑ No texture fighting/z-fighting

## Showcase
![Showcase of Blocky Rails with all four rail types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7pWkXU7L/images/f8f9162b82a7e6a9eb800d0bb4c89275c789b1ea.png)
![Showcase of Blocky Rail's corner rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7pWkXU7L/images/1de8215af7a7ce1096ccab4183179d39fbc0a8de.png)
